nodes.label: AI as initial iteration and brainstorming tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as final decision-maker or sole creator
nodes.grounding_span: I usually find myself using AI for initial iteration and brainstorming

nodes.label: AI as executive function assistant for ADHD
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of distraction or overwhelm
nodes.grounding_span: I use ChatGPT almost daily for executive function related tasks like to-do lists or breaking down big projects into smaller pieces

nodes.label: AI as honest mentor/coach providing feedback
nodes.label_negative: AI as sugar-coating or unreliable critic
nodes.grounding_span: it will give honest and not sugar-coated feedback on the project

nodes.label: AI as amplifier of human creativity
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI to amplify my own creative vision

nodes.label: AI as knowledgeable collaborator in unfamiliar domains
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or misleading guide
nodes.grounding_span: I used AI to assist me in talking through our ideas for the game

nodes.label: Creative control and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I am always in charge of the conversation

nodes.label: Human creativity as irreplaceable soul-expression
nodes.grounding_span: true art is sparked by something deep within the soul that AI can only imitate

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AI for productivity and support
Confident rejection of AI replacing human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: I don't have the same fears that some of them do about AI taking away our jobs

nodes.label: Trust in AI feedback to overcome perfectionism
nodes.grounding_span: I've learned to trust the model when it tells me, 'it's good, leave it alone!'

nodes.label: Customized structured interaction — uses custom instructions and modes to control AI behavior
nodes.grounding_span: I've given custom instructions to my ChatGPT that relate to how I think and how I best navigate my ADHD

nodes.label: Compartmentalization and task segmentation — separates tasks into different conversations or project folders
nodes.grounding_span: I can compartmentalize different tasks within different conversations or project folders
